name: standards-refresh.sh crawl dedupes pages by content hash so mirrored URLs never double a source's rules
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r37-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/docs $OUT/out && printf '

Doc

Publish each rule once

Mirrored pages must not duplicate the guidance they restate.

a b' > $OUT/docs/index.html && printf '

Mirror

Mirrored retention rule

Retain operational records for the mandated period.

' > $OUT/docs/a.html && cp $OUT/docs/a.html $OUT/docs/b.html && cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e.err; T=$OUT/out/node/r37-src.yaml; M=$(ls "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/.claude-tdd-pro/crawls/"r37-src-*.jsonl | head -1); grep -q 'duplicate-content' "$M" && [ "$(grep -c '^- id:.*mirrored-retention-rule' $T | tr -d ' ')" = "1" ] && echo duplicate-content-processed-once 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
